name: condukt
description: Deterministic orchestration engine for Claude Code: interpreter/researcher/worker/verifier skill pipeline plus a Rust binary that schedules tasks into parallel/serial batches by file-conflict analysis, manages the git-worktree lifecycle, tracks run state, and gates completion. v0.3: run resume across sessions (state resume-context + Phase 0-alt), stale-run reconcile (state reconcile auto-promotes merged branches to verified), benchmark stats (state stats), baseline test capture (Phase 4.5), pipeline verifier launch (no batch-wait), verifier-skip for mechanical done_criteria, auto-resume when 1 open run. Subscription-native (skill + agents + hook, no API key).
